ques: Search for a seafood paella recipe on Allrecipes with a minimum of 4.5 stars rating and at least 50 reviews. The recipe should include shrimp and mussels. Provide the ingredients, total time, and an overview of the preparation steps.
answer: Spanish Paella (Allrecipes) — 4.7★ with 178 reviews, containing shrimp and mussels. Ingredients: olive oil, onion, garlic, red bell pepper, 4 oz Spanish chorizo, 2 chicken breast halves, 12 oz Arborio rice, 5 cups chicken broth, ½ cup white wine, thyme, saffron, salt & pepper, 2 squid, 2 tomatoes, ½ cup peas, 12 large shrimp, 1 lb mussels, ¼ cup parsley, lemon slices. Total time: 1 hr 30 min (45 min prep + 45 min cook). Steps: (1) sauté onion/garlic/pepper, add chorizo/chicken/rice, then broth, wine, thyme & saffron; simmer 15 min; (2) add more broth as needed and cook until rice is done; (3) stir in squid, tomatoes & peas, arrange shrimp & mussels on top, cover with foil 3–5 min; (4) garnish with parsley and lemon and serve.
